checked.description: Whether the switch is in the on position

onChange.description: Callback fired when switch state changes. Receives event object with value, name, and args properties

onLabel.description: Label text displayed when switch is on

offLabel.description: Label text displayed when switch is off

id.description: HTML id attribute for the switch input

name.description: Name attribute for the switch input (used in forms)

args.description: Additional arguments passed to onChange handler

className.description: Additional CSS classes for the container
